thorne.name: Thorne-Blackwood
thorne.hero: Bridging the Gap: From Manual to 11-Node Precision.
thorne.sub: Transitioned to an 11-node trade engine via verified remote logic, removing human bias entirely.
reporting: Our initial skepticism was high. Trading high-frequency quants remotely felt like a risk we couldn't justify to our board. We started in the 'Developmental Tunnel', watching the engine in sandbox mode for 60 days.

The shift happened when we saw the 'Hard Breaker' node in action. It stopped a potential fat-finger trade in milliseconds. That moment proved the infrastructure was more disciplined than any human trader we've hired.
Today, we operate at a 72.4% confidence threshold. The engine doesn't just trade; it validates market regime before a single dollar is committed. It is now our primary capital base builder.

hardening.d: Hardening engines to meet the $2K infrastructure latency requirements.
Mandatory composite confidence threshold required for live order routing.
Systematic position sizing increases as node stability was proven over 90 days.

backtest.disclaimer: Baseline calculation: 2% position size | Institutional Slippage Model | 7% Error Haircut.

agri.name: Agri-Growth Farm
agri.hero: Building a Capital Base While You Sleep.
agri.sub: A custom negotiation for a farm business requiring minimal risk and maximum stability.
reporting: We didn't have much to start with, only $500, but we needed the capital to grow while we were out in the fields. The negotiation was tough; we needed the team to agree to a 'very slow' growth model.

The engine was tuned specifically for us—stripping away high-risk nodes and focusing on low-beta stock acquisition. It’s a minimal risk strategy that actually lets us sleep during the harvest seasons.

Watching the system acquire stocks automatically while our monthly $200 budget fuels it has been life-changing. It's not about the millions yet; it's about the resilience of the capital base we're building.

hardening.d: Calibrating sensors to prioritize low-beta, high-liquidity assets only.
Reduced threshold for entry but heightened exit sensitivity to protect the $500 base.
Modified pipeline to ignore high-volatility regime shifts entirely.

backtest.disclaimer: Growth model: Capital accumulation focus | 22% Error Haircut applied for infrastructure noise.
